# TESCA Visa Consultancy

> TESCA is a premium study abroad and student visa consultancy based in Surat, Gujarat, India. Established in 2005, TESCA has helped 30,000+ students successfully study in 12+ countries with a 97% visa success rate.

## Essential Info

- Name: TESCA Visa Consultancy
- Founded: 2005
- Type: Study Abroad & Visa Consultancy
- Headquarters: Surat, Gujarat, India
- Website: https://tescavisa.com
- Contact: tescavisaconsultancy87@gmail.com | +91 9824152731
- Branches: Simada Naka (Surat), Mota Varachha (Surat)

## Services

TESCA provides end-to-end study abroad support:

1. Career Counselling — Personalized country, course, and university guidance
2. University Admissions — Application preparation, shortlisting, and offer tracking
3. SOP & Documentation — Statement of Purpose review, LORs, CV optimization
4. Scholarships & Funding — Scholarship matching and application support
5. Test Preparation — IELTS, PTE, TOEFL coaching with mock tests
6. Visa Success Support — Student visa applications, interview prep, financial docs
7. Student Health Cover — Insurance comparison and policy selection
8. Education Finance — Education loans, blocked accounts, sponsor declarations
9. Student Housing — On-campus and off-campus accommodation guidance
10. Pre-Departure Support — Travel guidance, orientation, and settling-in support
11. Passport Assistance — Fresh applications, renewals, corrections, Tatkaal
12. Air Ticketing — Discounted student flights, route planning, baggage guidance

## Study Destinations

United States, United Kingdom, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, Germany, Ireland, Europe, Singapore, Dubai, Malaysia, Switzerland

## Trust Signals

- 30,000+ students placed abroad
- 97% visa success rate
- Operating since 2005 (20+ years)
- 12+ country destinations
- Free initial counselling — no fees for first consultation
- Multiple branches in Surat, Gujarat
